title: Presidential Guest House
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Presidential Guest House''' was where [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her retinue stayed on ''[[Cloud-Mother]]'' for the [[Herd Meet/Legends|Herd Meet]] of [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
